productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Snipe Lo Casual Shoes
description: The Snipe Lo shoes from adidas shows the newest  fashionable and low cut shoe featured in white that is more comfortable than other Basketball shoes combined with the black and maroon stripes on the heel and adiPRENE technology. You can not only feel the sexy and the high feeling of Sports, it is also a better choice whether for sports or for casual wear.UpperSynthetic upper with perforations on the fore-foot and midfoot for breathable comfortadidas patented 3-Stripe on the mid-foot for styleLace-ups for a snug and customised FitMeshed tongue with perforations on top and meshed collarMidsoleAdiPRENE technology and padded footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole exaggerated herringbone grooves and pivot points for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunligh
